name: 𝑻𝑯𝑬 𝑹𝑬𝑻𝑹𝑰𝑩𝑼𝑻𝑰𝑶𝑵
description:
"So many souls to play with. So little time...

Wouldn't you agree?"

400 SPECIAL

Oh, hello. I was waiting for you.

It took a long time for this world to become reality, but here I am.

We can FINNALY play together. I am so excited to see what you can do!

... Ah, sure. I almost forgot.

You may wanna know what happened to the soul of this profile didn't you? He begged me to explain things, and I'm going to do It out of pity.

All that happened was that the fool ended up breaking his own device. Therefore, he couldn't make any more of these challengers for people like you for a while.

As soon as he got a new one, he got to work though. At least he made up for his incompetence... with MY presence!

Oh, and another thing... This world is aware of the metallic copy's existence, so despite you being in a similar point of view, you're NOT him. So don't come saying it's not for any vessel!

Now that everything is clear, let's get straight to the point...

DO YOU WANT TO PLAY WITH ME?

MECHANICAL GOD By AZALI and Crow4277. This song will probably be only temporary.

Sonic.Exe Retribution by MapleRiot.

TAGS: Sonic, Sonic.Exe Retribution, Retribution, exe, executor, exetior, 2011x, Outcome Memories, Sonic.Exe The Disaster, Sonic The Hedgehog, Lord X, X, fight, combat, battle.
